entities.name: Product Sequencing
entities.context: Strategic approach where founders plan product order so later products benefit from infrastructure built for earlier ones

entities.name: Moat
entities.context: Competitive advantage that becomes harder for competitors to replicate over time

entities.name: Scale Leverage
entities.context: Efficiency gains where fixed investments (regulatory, relationships, data) amortize across multiple products

entities.name: Regulatory Framework
entities.context: Reusable compliance and approval infrastructure that transfers across product launches

entities.name: Data Pipeline
entities.context: Technical infrastructure that can serve multiple products once built

relationships.context: Product sequencing creates competitive moat through accumulated assets
Sequential products benefit from shared infrastructure investments
Regulatory work done once applies to subsequent products
Data infrastructure built for first product serves later products
